0.text: Centrilobular nodules with a tree-in-bud appearance in the apical segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Centrilobular nodules with a tree-in-bud appearance in a small area of the superior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Nodular consolidations in the apical segment of the right upper lobe

3.text: Nodular consolidations in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Multiple subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
